title: The Creep
description: An ARG like mod adding a progressive entity that becomes more aggressive as you complete tasks.
body:
The Creep:

Adds an entity that only activates after you find a Red Stained Porcelain Plate in a house that generates in any forests.



Phase 1: 
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Begins after getting the Red Stained Porcelain Plate.

Spawns in a slowly moves towards the player. Jumpscares the player after getting close enough and despawns. If it is hit, it will run but will not do any damage and with jumpscare a despawn. It does not swim well in water.

</details>





Phase 2: 
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Starts after crafting a Crucifix: Porcelain Plate in the middle surrounded by sticks (none in corners) with a diamond at the bottom.

Teleports behind the player and slowly walks towards them. If it reaches the player while still moving slowly, it will simply jumpscare them and despawn. If it begins sprinting, it will attack, but when at close proximity, has a small chance of despawning. Additionally, The Creep has a high chance of despawning if the player is below half health. It can also run across water.

</details>





Phase 3: 
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Starts after hitting The Creep with a crucifix. Same as Phase 2 but with a much smaller chance of despawning after it is moving fast. Has a glitch-like animation and a bloody texture.


</details>


Phase 4: 
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Has a chance to become "enraged" where it will do a fake despawn, teleporting to a random player after it disappears. When using a crucifix on it in this phase, it has a small chance of teleporting the player to a dark and empty mirror dimension for 30 seconds.

</details>



MORE PHASES PLANNED



This is a slight reconstruction of my He's Right Behind Me mod with a story and better design and balancing.
